C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF: HVEAL, JUDGE; PMEVECICH, CSR; VMU, CLERK. SAUL M. FERSTER, ESQ. ON BEHALF OF PLTFS BINH DAM; QUAN DAM; KENNETH HUYNH; DANNY DAM & AMANDA DAM; GEN FUJIOKA, ESQ. ON BEHALF OF DEFTS NAM SOU LEUNG; JENNY YUIOU LIANG; SAIO MEE HUI & YUE HENG LIANG. MATTER SETTLED AS FOLLOWS: PLTFS TO RECOVER & POSSESSION OF PROPERTY 1332-A 38TH AVE.(LOWER UNIT). PLTFS WAIVE OCT & NOV RENTS UPON DEFTS VACATING BY 6:00 PM JAN. 31, 2001. DEFTS TO PAY DEC RENT 12/8/00; JAN RENT 1/2/01. BOTH SIDES WAIVE ATTY FEES & COSTS. IF ALL TERMS ARE FOLLOWED, $800.00 SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE REFUNDED IF PROPERTY IS IN CONDITION AS PER PHOTOGRAPHS MADE A PART OF THE RECORD. THE COURT ORDERED DEFAULT AS TO YUE HENG LIANG BE SET ASIDE. IF ANY TERMS ARE DEFAULTED, IMMEDIATE POSSESSION, JUDGMENT EX PARTE & ALL MONIES OWING, ATTY FEES, COSTS & SHERIFF'S FEES ARE DUE. NO FURTHER STAY. CSL TO PREPARE STIP FOR JUDGMENT. CSL INFORMED CT THAT REMAINING DEFT YU QIU LEUNG IS JENNY YUIOU LIANG.
